metric_caveats: This three-record cap is a local hardware and DSPy component latency check, not a quality estimate.
This max-budget config raises max_tokens to Qwen's complex-benchmark recommendation while keeping Ollama thinking disabled through the DSPy LM adapter.
ChainOfThought still adds a model-visible reasoning field before the label and evidence outputs.
The optimizer metric is stricter than benchmark scoring: bootstrapped traces must match the normalized gold label and provide exact source-quote support for all non-no-reference labels.
Monthly-frequency, Purist category, and Pragmatic category metrics are benchmark-facing when run at meaningful sample sizes.
Raw exact, normalized-label exact, schema validity, abstention, and evidence support are diagnostic.
This config targets the fixed Gan synthetic validation split and must not be described as published Gan benchmark reproduction.
Record local Ollama residency/offload separately when inspecting this run.
